title: The Starseed Psyop
summary: The first question in the archive — Unimetrix 1's claim that the 'starseed' narrative was a disempowerment operation.
markdown:
The **Starseed Psyop** is the subject of the very first question in the archive's opening
session (January 1, 2021), and it sets the tone for much that follows.

Asked for "a 360 on the star seeds," Unimetrix 1 — and a voice it channels called "Professor
Newson" — answers that the entire starseed genre is a **psychological operation**: a narrative
created, in its telling, "to control the generation of your time, to make them perceive
impractical knowledge, keep them confused, keep them disempowered." It attributes the operation
not to DARPA but to a [Nazi intelligence](/lore/nazi-faction/) network, describing its purpose
as producing a "non-competition, subordinate" generation easy to control.

As a remedy, Unimetrix 1 points to exactly the tools the rest of the archive develops: accurate
scientific and spiritual knowledge, the [Five Rules](/lore/five-rules/), and the practice that
leads to self-empowerment. The Starseed Psyop is, in effect, the problem the whole project sets
out to answer.
